/usr/bin/c++ -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -O0 -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fprofile-instr-generate CMakeFiles/tst_FrameSource.dir/tst_FrameSource_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tst_FrameSource.dir/tests/tst_FrameSource.cpp.o -o tst_FrameSource -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib libOncoFlowTestLib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/Versions/A/QtMultimedia /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation -framework IOKit
